titleStmt.title: SII 16.330: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 330. (A.R. No. 691 of 1917.) KŌVELAKUṆṬLA, KOILKUNTLA TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in the Gaṇēśa temple.
This is dated Śaka 1565 (current), Chitrabhānu, Māgha ba. 30 corresponding to 1643 A.D., February 8, (Wednesday).

It states that Haṇḍe Siddha Rāmappa-nāyaka, son of Immaḍi Dēmappa-nāyaka and grandson of Dēmappa-nāyaka issued an order to the farmers of his nāyaṅkara territory of Kōvilakuṇṭḷa-sīma declaring that the mortgagees of the mānya lands of the gods and the Brahmaṇas in the territory should restore back free of all charges and together with the documents, their lands to the mortgagers after twelve years and that those who disobeyed this order were liable to be fined.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Avighnamastu śubhamastu . svastiśrī śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbbu
lu 1565 Agunēṭi citrabhānu saṁvatsara māgha ba 30
lu śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratā
pa śrīvīra śrīraṁggarāyadēvamahārāyalugāru pe
nugoṁḍḍasthaḷamaṁddu vajrasiṁhvāsanārūḍhulai pṛthivi sāṁ
mrājyaṁ cēyucuṁḍḍaṁggānu . śrīmadrājādhirāja khaṁḍḍeya
rāyavasaṁtta paradaḷavibhāḷa Arirāyamānamardana sadā
śrī siddarāmadēvara varaprasaṁnnulaina rājaśrī haṁḍḍe dēma
ppanāyanivāri pautṛḍunnu . yiṁmmaḍi dēmappa nāya
nivāriki putṛuḍunnu AIna sidharāmappa nāyanigāru . rā
yalayyavāru tama nāyaṁkarānaku pāliṁccina
kōvilakuṁṭlasīmaku niṁrnnayaṁ sēyiṁcci sthaḷamaṁdu vrā
yiṁccina dharmasilāśāsanaṁ yī tathātithi puṇyakālamaṁ
ddu siḍharāmēśvarulaku dēmappanāyanivāriki puṇyaṁggānu dēvabrāṁ
hmalu mōdalaina mānyālavāru yaṁdaru galarō vāricātanu kāpulu
modalaina jātulavāru peṭṭina bhōgyaĀyakaṁ cēlu paṁḍreṁḍu yēṁḍlu
Anubhaviṁcci padmūḍōyēṭanu Ā mānyagāṁḍla rūka pātika Aḍugaka
vāri cēlu vāriki viḍici patrāluṁnnu yiyyavalenu yiṭani sthaḷaṁreḍlu
kāmana raṁgāreḍigāri pāpireḍi gaḍḍaṁ Amilireḍigāri reḍiṁnni karaṇālu
mallamarāju veṁggaya Allamarāju kunukuṁṭlaya modalayina praja
la saṁmmatini kōvilakuṁṭlasīma ṭhāṇadāra durggaṁ tiṁmmāji paṁtulu
suṁkhaṁ basireḍḍi maṁgaṁṇnagārini daggaravuṁcci trikaruṇasudhigā trivācakaṁ
gā Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyigānu vēyiṁccina dharmaśāsanaṁ yiṁduku yavva
ru tappinā vāri tallitaṁḍṟla vāraṇāsilō vadhiṁccina pāpāna pōduru
paṁḍreṁḍḍu yēṁḍlu veḷḷitē bhōgyālu tappinavāru mānyālavāriki
vārivārikṣētrālu viḍici bhōgyapatrālu yiyyavalenu yī mariyā
daku tappi heccugā Anubhaviṁccirāyanā rājyaṁyēlēvāri nagariki
Aparādhaṁ yiyyavalenu yiṭlani vēyiṁccina dharmaśilāśāsanaṁ
svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ . paradattāpahārēṇa
svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . dānapālanayōrmadhyē dānātśrēyōnṛ
pālanaṁ . dānātsvargamavāpnōti pāva(la)nā daccutaṁ padaṁ . maṁ
ggaḷamahāśrīśrīśrīṁ jēyunū .
Digital edition of SII 16.330 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
